examples: The gonococcus and meningococcus, for example, are coffee-bean shaped.
Conclusion the developed synthetic medium and purification procedure were feasible and provided an experimental basis for the preparation of tetravalent meningococcus polysaccharide vaccine.
Moreover, the prevailing strains of meningococcus could evolve to become more virulent.
There are vaccines for other meningococcus strains, but a vaccine for the group B strains had been eluding microbiologists because their surface sugars are identical to human ones.
